caption:
Apertus, developed by the Swiss AI Initiative, is a fully open foundation model for Sovereign AI. It complies with EU AI Act requirements and is designed for performance with multilingual capabilities across 1000+ languages. 0d93f2a50

Are open models essential for ethical AI? 

Sources: APERTUS, Swiss AI Initiative

slides.headline: APERTUS IS A FULLY OPEN FOUNDATION MODEL FOR SOVEREIGN AI
slides.image_prompt: A vibrant, collaborative workspace with diverse researchers discussing AI models, surrounded by computers and whiteboards.

slides.headline: SWISS AI INITIATIVE DEVELOPED APERTUS WITH EPFL AND ETH ZURICH
slides.sub: This collaboration aims to make AI accessible and ethical.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up of a group of researchers from different backgrounds working together on AI technology.

slides.headline: APERTUS MEETS EU AI ACT REQUIREMENTS FOR DATA PRIVACY
slides.sub: It respects opt-outs and removes personally identifiable information.
slides.image_prompt: An illustration of a secure digital lock, symbolizing data privacy, with a backdrop of European landmarks.

slides.headline: APERTUS COMPETES WITH TOP MODELS AT 8B AND 70B PARAMETERS
slides.sub: It's multilingual from day one, trained on 1000+ languages.
slides.image_prompt: An animated globe surrounded by diverse language scripts, showcasing global communication.

slides.headline: APERTUS PROMISES A GLOBAL FOUNDATION FOR AI DEVELOPMENT
slides.sub: Follow @everydayhypehq for daily AI + Tech breakthroughs.
